summary: Justin Brennan teaches the complete process for buying 15-50 unit multifamily properties, including deal sourcing through brokers, underwriting using NOI-based metrics (14-20% annualized returns, 6-10% cash-on-cash, 1.8x+ equity multiple), and structuring deals with 10% GP capital to control $1M+ assets. He demonstrates how to raise equity from investors by presenting deals with strong financial metrics and positioning as General Partner to capture multiple revenue streams (acquisition fees, asset management, cash flow splits, depreciation benefits).
takeaways: Target 10-30 unit deals for first investments to get broker callbacks and manage capital raises efficiently
Leverage broker relationships on-market to access 60%+ of off-market pre-market deals that never hit websites
Deal value formula: Building Value = NOI / Cap Rate; every $1,000/month NOI boost adds $220,000 in value
Metrics that attract investors: 14-20% annualized return, 6-10% cash-on-cash, 1.8x+ equity multiple minimum
Capital stack structure: 70% debt/30% equity typical; GP brings 10% cash but gets 30% of deal economics (double-dip)
Acquisition fees typically 2-3% of purchase price, asset management 1-2% of revenue, and 30-40% of cash flow/profits
Raising $300K-500K equity on first deals realistic via family/friends/investors when deal metrics justify 14-20%+ returns

skill_candidates.change: Apply NOI-based underwriting with specific return thresholds to evaluate deal quality systematically
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin teaches the formula V=NOI/Cap Rate and emphasizes that for every $1,000/month NOI increase, property value increases $220,000. He specifies that good deals must hit 14-20% annualized returns, 6-10% cash-on-cash, and 1.8x+ equity multiple. He shows deal analyzers plug-and-play templates that automatically calculate these metrics from revenue/expense inputs.

skill_candidates.change: Build broker relationships by touring on-market properties to access their 60%+ pre-market inventory
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin explains that 40% or less of deals appear on websites; 60%+ are sold pre-market to broker databases. He demonstrates the exact script: identify 3 properties in a target market from websites, call brokers, schedule tours, build rapport, then leverage that relationship to get pre-market deal access in email/inbox before listings go public. He did this in Kansas City and sourced first 5 deals this way.

skill_candidates.change: Use 90-day goal with concrete milestones to overcome paralysis-by-analysis and execute first deal
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin repeatedly emphasizes 'jump off the cliff' and 'allow the how to show up.' He offers a 90-day guarantee to locate and analyze a deal that makes financial sense or refund mentorship. He stresses that with proper process (deal + pitch deck + raising process), execution happens within 90 days if you follow his framework and commit capital of $15-30K initial out-of-pocket.

title: Multifamily Real Estate Investing: How To Buy Your First Apartment Building - Expert Strategies
